title: pilosella aurantiaca subsp. aurantiaca
intro: Pilosella aurantiaca subsp. aurantiaca, also known as Orange Hawk's Beard, is a flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to Europe and western Asia. The medicinal properties of Pilosella aurantiaca subsp. aurantiaca lie in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its use in treating digestive problems, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system, as well as its potential to act as a natural antacid and anti-diarrheal agent. Pilosella aurantiaca subsp. aurantiaca can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
